ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., K-Nearest Neighbors, Random Forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., draft, reviewed, deployed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version ID */,
  "activation" TEXT /* Activation function used */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for model training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "criterion" TEXT /* Criterion for model evaluation */,
  "feature_0" INTEGER /* Feature 0 (binary) */,
  "feature_1" INTEGER /* Feature 1 (binary) */,
  "feature_2" INTEGER /* Feature 2 (binary) */,
  "leaf_size" INTEGER /* Leaf size for tree-based models */,
  "learning_rate" TEXT /* Learning rate schedule */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the tree */,
  "max_features" TEXT /* Number of features to consider when looking for the best split */,
  "min_samples_leaf" INTEGER /* Minimum number of samples required to be at a leaf node */,
  "min_samples_split" INTEGER /* Minimum number of samples required to split an internal node */,
  "n_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "n_neighbors" INTEGER /* Number of neighbors to use in K-Nearest Neighbors */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for training */,
  "weights" TEXT /* Weight function used in prediction */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the model */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken for training the model */,
  "training_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations during training */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model during training */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration ID */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was recorded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset ID */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the performance metrics */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset ID */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Brief summary of performance metrics for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model evaluator, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration ID */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., feature_0, feature_1) */,
  "feature_value" INTEGER /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feature */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration ID */,
  "hyperparam_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., batch_size, learning_rate) */,
  "hyperparam_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hyperparameter was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration ID */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, error, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version ID */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
